_publications._publicationTitle: Neuronal hyperexcitability drives central and peripheral nervous system tumor progression in models of neurofibromatosis-1.

_contextSnippet: Increased midkine expression was also detected in RGCs from Nf1 +/R681X-mutant mice...another mouse strain that develops optic gliomas
details: RGCs from Nf1 +/R681X-mutant mice had increased midkine expression, similar to Nf1 +/neo mice
